,"style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害双向提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害结果提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害结果降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【玫瑰的秘密】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"以下是一段来自熔断警备署的，可供超链者查阅的机密记录，禁止一切形式的复制、外传："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"根据可靠的调查与取证，现今海德拉银行排行第四的经理人，异格者维罗妮卡，曾有过一段不为人知的悲惨过去。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"维罗妮卡出身于洛莱地区，有过一段时间的流浪经历，并且在该期间遭受过近乎非人的虐待。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"我们有理由推测，这段早期经历是造成她现阶段性格的重要因素之一。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"巧合的是，在这样环境下成长的维罗妮卡，拥有了极为罕见的预言能力——那些在她身侧绽放的玫瑰，往往是某种趋势的预兆。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"我们有理由相信，正是因为此项特别的能力，才使得她受到海德拉前任行长法恩利的关照，并扶持着她一路走到了现在的位置。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"综上，海德拉银行与超链者协会虽关系密切，但我们将继续秘密留意维罗妮卡的动向，并加以记录。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【玫瑰的诺言】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"富丽、豪华、别具一格的玫瑰城堡，柯卡尔迪是第一次来到这里。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"虽然装饰极尽奢华，整个城堡也大得叫人吃惊，但除了那位侍女莉吉尔以外，柯卡尔迪并没有见到其他的任何人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"未免也太过于冷清了一些。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「难以置信，柯卡尔迪先生以及利维娅小姐居然会来这里。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"莉吉尔认识柯卡尔迪，也认识利维娅。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"前不久，法恩利行长失踪之后，作为法恩利行长唯一的继承者，利维娅小姐在柯卡尔迪的支持下，成为了海德拉银行现任的代理行长。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"也就是近期，这原本无人问津的宅邸，又开始陆陆续续迎来了客人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"莉吉尔为柯卡尔迪以及旁边的利维娅端上了一杯红茶，浓郁的茶香，倒是和这落地窗外的玫瑰园极其相配。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"柯卡尔迪轻呷了一口，回味悠长，口感甚至要比他以往喝过的所有红茶都要好。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这是什么茶？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"倒是利维娅品尝出来了不一样。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「要我说……我也不是很懂，是小姐自己制作的……一般都用来招待客人使用……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"利维娅也没想到，维罗妮卡居然会有这样的手艺。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「茶很不错。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「当然，你的冲泡手艺也很好。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"利维娅恭维了一声。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「冲泡的手艺也是小姐教我的。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「但说是招待客人用的，平时也不怎么能用上。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这座宅子虽然很大，但会到这里的人很少，平时也只有我和小姐。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「别看小姐那样，但其实她很温柔，手也很巧……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"莉吉尔像是打开了话匣子，开始滔滔不绝地讲述了起来……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那她现在人呢？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"柯卡尔迪放下了红茶杯，然后问着她。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「她在浴室里沐浴呢，应该马上就出来了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「二位稍等一会儿就好。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"莉吉尔像是明白了自己的失仪，说完之后，就站在了旁边，不再说话。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"再度沉寂下来的客厅，变得极为安静。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"柯卡尔迪甚至能听见利维娅的呼吸声。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「放轻松些。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「在她的面前，如果你暴露出自己的弱小，是会被吃干抹净的。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"柯卡尔迪深吸了口气，然后提醒着旁边的利维娅。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「嗯……我知道了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"利维娅轻声地点了点头。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"没过多久，高跟鞋的嗒嗒声，就划破了这里的安静。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"柯卡尔迪和利维娅都朝着声音的来源方向望去。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「真是稀客。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"还没见到人，维罗妮卡的声音就传了过来。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但随后，披着浴袍、踩着高跟的她便从柯卡尔迪后方的走廊走了出来。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"没有平日里鲜红的装束，让人血脉喷张的身材，只用了一件浴袍轻轻地包裹着。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"利维娅想要站起来，但却被柯卡尔迪阻止。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「实在是没有预料到你们会来，做了个噩梦出了一身冷汗，就去泡了个澡。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「怠慢了二位，二位应该不会介意吧。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"维罗妮卡笑盈盈地坐了下来。随即，莉吉尔为维罗妮卡端上了红茶。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我倒是不介意，但是在代理行长面前，你应该学会更懂规矩一些。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这对我们都好。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"柯卡尔迪甚至没有抬眼看向维罗妮卡。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「瞧你说的，法恩利行长向来大度，既然是法恩利行长的继承人，那自然也不会小家子气，不是吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"维罗妮卡看向了旁边一直没有说话的利维娅。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那……那是当然，维罗妮卡小姐是主人，在自己的宅邸，随意一些就好。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「善解人意的性格，我喜欢。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「所以呢，代理行长，还有海德拉银行最出色的经理人，两位来到我的宅邸，不会只想跟我喝茶吧。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「坐在这里……有做好坐在这里的觉悟吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"维罗妮卡单手撑着自己的下巴，幽幽地看向了眼前的利维娅。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那是一种猎人看向猎物的眼神。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「维罗妮卡小姐……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"利维娅刚要张口，但却被柯卡尔迪阻止。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这句话，你不应该问我们，我想应该由我们来问你比较合适。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「眼下的局面……你既然让我们进来，还坐在了我们面前，那你……做好相应的觉悟了吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「……不愧是海德拉银行十大经理人中排名第一的经理人，变色龙先生……席琳丝那小丫头，给你取的绰号真是恰如其分。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「利维娅小姐，你应该很庆幸，此时此刻，柯卡尔迪愿意站在你的身边。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不过……柯卡尔迪，你想让我站在你这一边，只是这点觉悟还不够。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「要让我死心塌地，你得想好，如何才能让我心潮彭拜。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"柯卡尔迪端起红茶，轻呷了一口。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「茶有些凉了，莉吉尔，能辛苦你帮我们加一些热茶吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他扭头，看向了旁边了莉吉尔。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「哦……好的，实在是抱歉，柯卡尔迪先生。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"随后，莉吉尔拿起茶壶，为柯卡尔迪和利维娅的杯子里添茶。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"茶香，再度盈开。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【玫瑰的葬仪】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"法恩利的墓，就设在海德拉银行总部不远的一座公墓里。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"献上玫瑰之后，维罗妮卡跟随柯卡尔迪，来到了一处别馆。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我并不明白。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"维罗妮卡看向对面的柯卡尔迪。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不明白什么？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"柯卡尔迪放下手中的红茶。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「如果你想取得行长的位置并不困难，为什么会选择站在利维娅的身边。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"维罗妮卡看着眼前这个男人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"有时候她能一眼看穿这个男人，但有时候，又觉得自己看不懂这个男人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「人类发明了一个词叫『意义』，并去琢磨它，分析它，试图寻找到支撑自己行动、前进乃至活下去的理由。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「野心从来都不是一个好的理由，燃烧起来的时候，会将自己烧得干干净净。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我只想做个简单的人，做简单的事。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「法恩利是个糟糕透顶的家伙，但这老头对我一向很照顾，所以他留下的烂摊子，我总得为他做点什么，仅此而已。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你……不也一样吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「玫瑰因何而绽放？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「只为那——等待花开之人。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"柯卡尔迪看着眼前那个华美而艳丽的女人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「法恩利还和你说什么了？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「老头只和我说，让我遇见麻烦的时候，可以放心依靠你。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「信任我可没什么好下场哦。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"维罗妮卡笑了一声。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「但恕我直言。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她放下茶杯。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你有些傲慢了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「如果你以为利维娅可以挽救四分五裂的海德拉银行，或者说希望利维娅能够阻止海德拉银行分裂……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那你未免也太小看其他几个人了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「宁芙涅、席琳丝、克索图、阿尔瑟克……他们会把你们嚼干净，骨头渣子都不剩下。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"维罗妮卡看着柯卡尔迪。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「但海德拉银行现在，需要利维娅。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"柯卡尔迪反驳。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你错了，海德拉银行，谁也不需要。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「它如同一只贪婪的巨兽，会毫不犹豫吞噬所有踏进这里的人。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「驯服它，才是唯一的出路。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"维罗妮卡的嘴角露出一抹微笑。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「尽情挣扎吧，柯卡尔迪。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我会在这座宅邸里看着你，看着你带着利维娅一起挣扎。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「是你们先驯服它，还是它先吞噬你们。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不过……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「看在你如此诚意的份上……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我会给你一个承诺。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"维罗妮卡笑着，然后拿出一朵黄金玫瑰，放在了柯卡尔迪身前……"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.7856ff041b91c","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"增益偷取，护盾，免死"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"|
